  • Classes in org.mose.command used by org.mose.command
    Class
    Description
    ArgumentCommand
    An argument command is a command that uses CommandArgument as its arguments.
    CommandArgument
    A argument for ArgumentCommand.
    CommandArgumentResult
    This tells the command system how the argument should be processed, including the result object of the argument and how many string arguments to move ahead of.
    ParseCommandArgument
    The basic interface for parsing a CommandArgument.
    SuggestCommandArgument
